title: Tribal Affairs
summary: This source is a U.S. Treasury informational page describing the Office of Tribal and Native Affairs, which coordinates Tribal government relations and consultations. The page is not relevant to market structure or macro catalysts topics; it contains no economic data releases, monetary policy content, market-moving information, or financial analysis.
key_points: Office of Tribal and Native Affairs established September 2022 by Treasury
Office advises on Tribal policy, coordinates Tribal consultations, and manages Treasury Tribal Advisory Committee (TTAC)
TTAC is a seven-member advisory committee on Tribal tax matters pursuant to Tribal General Welfare Exclusion Act of 2014
Office works across Treasury and IRS offices on economic programs and tax policies impacting Tribal communities
Source contains no economic indicators, rate decisions, market data, or financial research
why_it_matters: Not relevant to finance research. This is a government administrative page about intergovernmental Tribal affairs coordination, containing no information applicable to market structure, macro catalysts, trading, or investment research.
